class.name: GDKStats
class.brief_description: Xbox Services statistics service accessed via GDK.stats.
class.description: Wraps Xbox Services user statistics queries, title-managed statistic updates, statistic tracking, and an in-memory stat cache. Query and flush methods return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit [GDKResult].

method.name: query_user_stats_async
method.description: Queries the specified statistics for [param user]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; on success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [Dictionary] keyed by statistic name.

method.name: query_users_stats_async
method.description: Queries the specified statistics for multiple target XUIDs using [param user] as the local Xbox Services context. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [Dictionary] keyed by XUID, with each value a statistic-name dictionary.

method.name: set_stat_integer
method.description: Stages an integer title-managed statistic for [param user]. Call [method flush_stats_async] to submit staged values.

method.name: set_stat_number
method.description: Stages a numeric title-managed statistic for [param user]. Call [method flush_stats_async] to submit staged values.

method.name: flush_stats_async
method.description: Submits the staged title-managed statistics for [param user]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly.

method.name: track_stats
method.description: Starts tracking real-time changes for the specified statistics belonging to [param user]. Changes are surfaced through [signal stat_changed] and [signal stats_updated] after [method GDK.dispatch] pumps callbacks.

method.name: stop_tracking_stats
method.description: Stops tracking the specified statistics for [param user]. Passing an empty array stops all tracked statistics for that user.

method.name: get_cached_stats
method.description: Returns the cached statistics for [param user], keyed by statistic name.

signal.name: stats_updated
signal.description: Emitted when cached statistics for [param user] are updated.

signal.name: stat_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a tracked statistic changes.

signal.name: stats_flushed
signal.description: Emitted after staged statistics have been submitted for [param user].
